channel.title: Mammalia
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Mammalia

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Ahmad Mahmoudi, Adam Konečný, Farnaz Khanalipour, Farimah Bashiri Barkshadi, Azadeh Sayyahi, Boris Kryštufek DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2025-frontmatter2

item.title: New year, new opossums? Comparing the diet and health related characteristics of Didelphis virginiana over four years
item.description: Article by Ahmad Mahmoudi, Adam Konečný, Farnaz Khanalipour, Farimah Bashiri Barkshadi, Azadeh Sayyahi, Boris Kryštufek DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0068

item.title: Neonate morphometrics and lambing season characteristics of desert bighorn sheep
item.description: Article by Ahmad Mahmoudi, Adam Konečný, Farnaz Khanalipour, Farimah Bashiri Barkshadi, Azadeh Sayyahi, Boris Kryštufek DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0074

item.title: Status and ecology of forest antelopes and other large mammals in the Ngoyla Faunal Reserve, Cameroon
item.description: Article by Ahmad Mahmoudi, Adam Konečný, Farnaz Khanalipour, Farimah Bashiri Barkshadi, Azadeh Sayyahi, Boris Kryštufek DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0056

item.title: Activity budget and feeding patterns of the Red Giant Gliding Squirrel (Petaurista petaurista, Pallas 1766) in the Eastern Himalayan rainforest of India
item.description: Article by Ahmad Mahmoudi, Adam Konečný, Farnaz Khanalipour, Farimah Bashiri Barkshadi, Azadeh Sayyahi, Boris Kryštufek DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0103

item.title: Where do the langurs criss-cross? Spatial understanding of group composition and habitat of mixed-species groups of Nilgiri langur (Semnopithecus johnii Fischer, 1829) and tufted gray langur (Semnopithecus priam Blyth, 1844) across the Western Ghats, India
item.description: Article by Ahmad Mahmoudi, Adam Konečný, Farnaz Khanalipour, Farimah Bashiri Barkshadi, Azadeh Sayyahi, Boris Kryštufek DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0135

item.title: Mainland leopard cat (Prionailurus bengalensis bengalensis) population density in an unprotected mixed landscape of the Himalayan Foothills in Nepal
item.description: Article by Ahmad Mahmoudi, Adam Konečný, Farnaz Khanalipour, Farimah Bashiri Barkshadi, Azadeh Sayyahi, Boris Kryštufek DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0067

item.title: Filling gaps in the distribution of the Guianan broad-nosed bat (Platyrrhinus guianensis): an extension in distribution beyond the Guiana Shield
item.description: Article by Ahmad Mahmoudi, Adam Konečný, Farnaz Khanalipour, Farimah Bashiri Barkshadi, Azadeh Sayyahi, Boris Kryštufek DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0025

item.title: Use of latrine surveys to identify the expansion and fragmentation of swamp rabbit (Sylvilagus aquaticus) distribution at the eastern edge of their range
item.description: Article by Ahmad Mahmoudi, Adam Konečný, Farnaz Khanalipour, Farimah Bashiri Barkshadi, Azadeh Sayyahi, Boris Kryštufek DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0090

item.title: Occurrence of pantropical spotted dolphin (Stenella attenuata) in northern Peru: an El Niño effect?
item.description: Article by Ahmad Mahmoudi, Adam Konečný, Farnaz Khanalipour, Farimah Bashiri Barkshadi, Azadeh Sayyahi, Boris Kryštufek DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0119

item.title: First records of Anoura cadenai Mantilla-Meluk et Baker, 2006 (Chiroptera: Phyllostomidae) for Venezuela
item.description: Article by Ahmad Mahmoudi, Adam Konečný, Farnaz Khanalipour, Farimah Bashiri Barkshadi, Azadeh Sayyahi, Boris Kryštufek DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0045

item.title: Genetic variation of cytochrome b in the prairie vole (Microtus ochrogaster)
item.description: Article by Ahmad Mahmoudi, Adam Konečný, Farnaz Khanalipour, Farimah Bashiri Barkshadi, Azadeh Sayyahi, Boris Kryštufek DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0105

item.title: Phylogenetic position of Leimacomys, an enigmatic African rodent genus, reconsidered in the light of morphological and its first genetic data
item.description: Article by Ahmad Mahmoudi, Adam Konečný, Farnaz Khanalipour, Farimah Bashiri Barkshadi, Azadeh Sayyahi, Boris Kryštufek DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0040

item.title: First confirmed record of Microtus rossiaemeridionalis from Iran
item.description: Article by Ahmad Mahmoudi, Adam Konečný, Farnaz Khanalipour, Farimah Bashiri Barkshadi, Azadeh Sayyahi, Boris Kryštufek DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/mammalia-2024-0107
